episodes.title: Epstein Survivor Marina Lacerda Breaks Her Silence | One on One in the Purple Room (Ep1)
episodes.description:
One on One in the Purple Room – Episode 1 features an emotional and powerful interview with Marina Lacerda, a Jeffrey Epstein survivor speaking out about her experience, healing, and fight for justice. In this exclusive sit-down, Marina shares details about her survival story, the trauma she endured, and how she rebuilt her life after escaping Epstein’s abuse.

This episode dives into:
• Marina Lacerda’s early experiences
• How she became connected to Jeffrey Epstein
• The abuse she survived
• The long-term impact and road to recovery
• Why she’s speaking out now
• Her message to other survivors

Hosted inside the Purple Room, this series aims to bring raw, honest, unfiltered conversations with people whose stories deserve to be heard.

✨ If this interview moved you, please LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE to support survivor voices and independent journalism.
